task.objective: Add lastRunOnly parameter to database functions to support "last run" filtering
task.context:
Current state: - All queries aggregate ALL executions in time range - No function supports lastRunOnly parameter
Target state: - When lastRunOnly=true, filter metrics to most recent execution - Most recent execution determined by branch/suite filter

change.action: Inside the function: 1. Extract lastRunOnly, branch, suite from options 2. If lastRunOnly=true, call getLatestExecutionId(orgId, branch, suite) 3. Add WHERE execution_id = latestId to relevant queries
1. Add lastRunOnly to ReliabilityScoreOptions interface 2. When lastRunOnly=true, filter to latest execution
1. Add executionId?: number to options 2. When executionId provided, filter to that execution's results 3. Calculate flakiness from test_results instead of aggregate table

change.description: Export new helper and update getQueriesForOrg
change.action: 1. Export getLatestExecutionId 2. Add lastRunOnly support to wrapped functions in getQueriesForOrg

sql_patterns.pattern: WITH latest_execution AS ( SELECT id FROM test_executions WHERE organization_id = $1 AND ($2::text IS NULL OR branch = $2) AND ($3::text IS NULL OR suite = $3) AND completed_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT ... FROM test_results tr WHERE tr.execution_id = (SELECT id FROM latest_execution)

testing.test: getLatestExecutionId returns correct ID for branch filter
getLatestExecutionId returns correct ID for suite filter
getLatestExecutionId returns null when no matches
getDashboardMetrics with lastRunOnly=true returns single execution data
getDashboardMetrics with lastRunOnly=false returns aggregated data
Run: npm run build (no TypeScript errors)

mandatory_commit_step.commit_format: feat(overall-reliability-performance-improvements): phase-03 - Add lastRunOnly parameter to database queries
